briefdescription.para: PUF maximum key generation iterations to obtain PUF iterative convergence.
This function captures PUF ID generated into XPuf_Data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XPuf_Data structure which includes options to configure PUF.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful PUF ID capture
XPUF_ERROR_PUF_DONE_ID_NT_RDY Upon PUF ID not ready
Reads PUF ID from PUF_ID_0 to PUF_ID_7 registers

briefdescription.para: This function will regenerate the Puf key form Aux data, Chash and syndrome data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XPuf_Data structure which includes options to configure PUF.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS PUF key regeneration successful
XPUF_ERROR_SYNDROME_WORD_WAIT_TIMEOUT Timeout occurred while waiting for PUF Syndrome data
XPUF_ERROR_KEY_NOT_CONVERGED When PUF key is not converged
XST_FAILURE Unexpected event
Start the PUF in Regeneration mode
Check for Key ready
Indicates that the key is ready. Clears on read or CMD = STOP
Indicates that the syndrome word is ready. Clears on read or CMD = STOP
Read the Debug date and discard
Read the Debug date and discard
Read the last debug 2- words and discard
Request to capture Key & ID

briefdescription.para: This function waits till Puf Syndrome ready bit is set and captures the PUF status.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Syndrome word is ready.
XST_TIMEOUT if timeout occurred.

briefdescription.para: This function waits till Puf Syndrome ready bit is set.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Syndrome word is ready.
XST_TIMEOUT if timeout occurred.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Global Variation Filter option provided by the user.

parameterdescription.para: User configuration to enable/disable Global Variation Filter in PUF.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful Puf Operation.
XST_TIMEOUT if timeout occurred.

briefdescription.para: This function reset the PUF module after clearing the PUF data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful Puf Operation.
XST_FAILURE Upon any failure.

briefdescription.para: This function brings the PUF module out of reset.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful Puf Operation.
XST_FAILURE if timeout occurred.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XPuf_Data structure which includes options to configure PUF.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS PUF registration successful
XPUF_ERROR_INVALID_PARAM PufData is NULL
Perform input parameters validation, return XPUF_ERROR_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Issue a command stop
Configures the Global Variation Filter option provided by user and updates PUF Configuration0 register.
Update PUF Configuration1 register as 4k Registration mode.
Update Shutter value in PUF_SHUT register.
Update PUF Ring Oscillator Swap setting.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XPuf_Data structure which includes options to configure PUF.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS PUF registration successful
XPUF_ERROR_INVALID_PARAM PufData is NULL
XPUF_ERROR_SYNDROME_WORD_WAIT_TIMEOUT Timeout occurred while waiting for PUF Syndrome data
XPUF_ERROR_PUF_OVERFLOW When PUF overflow error has occurred
XPUF_ERROR_SYN_DATA_ERROR Error when syndrome data is not generated properly
XST_FAILURE Unexpected event

simplesect.para: Helper data will be available in PufData->SyndromeData, PufData->Chash, PufData->Aux

listitem.para: Issue PUF command
PUF helper data includes Syndrome data, CHash and Auxiliary data. Capturing Syndrome data word by word.
Once complete Syndrome data is captured and PUF operation is done, read CHash, Auxiliary data and PUF ID.
Check for overflow and return XPUF_ERROR_PUF_OVERFLOW in case of error

briefdescription.para: This function regenerates PUF data using helper data stored in eFUSE or external memory.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XPuf_Data structure which includes options to configure PUF.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS PUF key regeneration successful
XPUF_ERROR_SYNDROME_WORD_WAIT_TIMEOUT Timeout occurred while waiting for PUF Syndrome data
XPUF_ERROR_KEY_NOT_CONVERGED When PUF key is not converged
XST_FAILURE Unexpected event
Configure the PUF

inbodydescription.para:
Run PUF regeneration through iterative convergence
Check for the syndrome data is ready or not in the given timeout value. if not, return XPUF_ERROR_SYNDROME_WORD_WAIT_TIMEOUT
Capture the Key and ID. Return XPUF_ERROR_KEY_NOT_CONVERGED on failure.
Once the Key and ID are captured, reset the PUF

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if PUF ID is cleared successfully
XPUF_ERROR_PUF_ID_ZERO_TIMEOUT if timeout while clearing PUF ID
Set least significant bit in the PUF_CLEAR register.
The API waits for ID_ZERO bit to be set in PUF Status register. If id zero bit is not set within 1 second then returns XPUF_ERROR_PUF_ID_ZERO_TIMEOUT else returns XST_SUCCESS.

briefdescription.para: Converts the PUF Syndrome data to eFUSE writing format.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XPuf_Data structure which includes options to configure PUF.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS Syndrome data is successfully trimmed
XPUF_ERROR_INVALID_PARAM PufData instance pointer is NULL
XST_INVALID_PARAM Input parameters for Xil_SMemCpy are NULL

simplesect.para: Formatted data will be available at PufData->TrimmedSynData

listitem.para: Check if PufData instance pointer is NULL. If NULL, return XPUF_ERROR_INVALID_PARAM.
Copy syndrome data from instance pointer to a local variable. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if the given input parameters are invalid(NULL)

inbodydescription.para: Trimming logic for PUF Syndrome Data:
Space allocated in eFUSE for syndrome data = 4060bits
PUF Helper data generated for 4K Mode through registration is 140 Words = 140*32 = 4480 bits. Remove lower 12 bits of every fourth word of syndrome data.
After removing these bits remaining syndrome data will be exactly 4060bits which will fit into eFUSE.
3FE53F74 > F74 has to removed & next word upper 12 bits have to be shifted here

listitem.para: Use the above mentioned logic to trim the data and copy the trimmed data in TrimmedSynData array in the instance pointer. and return XST_SUCCESS.
